subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Amín, upon him be the glory of God, the Lord of all worlds, hath attained unto Our presence and been blessed with the bounties of the Dawning-Place of Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب امین علیه بهاء الله رب العالمین تلقاء وجه حاضر و بعنایات مشرق ظهور فائز
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement
